name: pdf-toolkit
description: > Audit PDF files for metadata leakage, page count, encryption, JavaScript, embedded files, and version. Use before sending a PDF externally, when redacting sensitive metadata, or when the user mentions PDF audit, PDF metadata, PDF leakage check, or PDF security review.
author: borghei
summary_zh: 一个 PDF 安全审计小工具，可检查元数据泄露、加密状态、嵌入脚本和附件等隐患，适合在对外发送文件前做一轮敏感信息排查。
